query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'partners' AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 40 ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
